mapper.select: select id, role_code, role_name, description, created_at, updated_at from sys_role where role_code = #{roleCode} limit 1

select id, role_code, role_name, description, created_at, updated_at from sys_role where role_code in
#{roleCode}
select r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.description, r.created_at, r.updated_at from sys_role r inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
